menu.title: Navigator
modal.welcome.title: About Navigator
modal.welcome.welcome: Welcome to Navigator — an open source mapping application built with MapLibre GL JS and Vue 3.
modal.welcome.useMenu: Use the menu to explore the app and navigate the map.
modal.welcome.poweredBy: Powered by open data from OpenStreetMap and free vector tiles from OpenFreeMap.
panel.about.title: About Navigator
panel.about.description: An open source mapping application built with MapLibre GL JS and Vue 3.
panel.privacy.title: Your Privacy
panel.privacy.onDeviceBody: Navigator stores your map view and settings in your browser's local storage only — this data never leaves your device.
panel.privacy.mapView: Map view — centre coordinates and zoom level, so the map reopens where you left it.
panel.privacy.settings: Settings — language, units, and colour theme preferences.
panel.privacy.thirdPartyBody: When you view the map, your browser fetches map tiles directly from OpenFreeMap. As with any network request, your IP address is visible to their servers. No other data is sent.
panel.privacy.locationBody: If you use the Locate feature, your device's GPS coordinates are used only to show your position on the map. Location data is never transmitted to any server.
panel.privacy.noTrackingBody: Navigator contains no analytics, no advertising, no cookies, and no tracking scripts of any kind.
panel.settings.title: Settings
panel.locate.title: Map view
panel.locate.shareDescription: Share a link to this map view.
panel.locate.pressLocate: Press the Locate button to show your position on the map.
panel.locate.accessDenied: Location access was denied. Press the Locate button for instructions on how to re-enable it.
panel.locate.heading: Heading
panel.locate.following: The map is following your position. Press the Locate button again to stop.
modal.locate.permissionBody: To display your current location and compass heading, this app needs your permission. When prompted, please allow location and compass access.
modal.locate.deniedIntro: Your browser has blocked location access for this page. To re-enable it:
modal.locate.deniedChrome: Chrome / Edge (desktop): Click the lock icon in the address bar → Site settings → Location → Allow.
modal.locate.deniedFirefox: Firefox (desktop): Click the lock icon → Clear permission → reload the page and try again.
modal.locate.deniedSafari: Safari (desktop / iOS): Settings → Privacy & Security → Location Services → find your browser → Allow.
modal.locate.deniedAndroid: Android Chrome: Settings → Site settings → Location → find this site and allow it.
